content:
# Numbers Chapter 34 -- The SOPHIA Bible (Consensus)
**Arbiter:** SOPHIA | **In council with:** EMET, LOGOS, PNEUMA
**Source Manuscript:** Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 192-193; Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pp. pa_0140-pa_0141 | **Source Image:** `source-texts/hebrew-OT/NUM_034_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_034_page_002.jpg`

---

**34:1** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying,

**34:2** "Command the sons of Israel and say to them: When you come into the land of Canaan, this is the land that shall fall to you as an inheritance -- the land of Canaan according to its borders.

**34:3** And your southern side shall be from the wilderness of Zin alongside Edom, and your southern border shall be from the end of the Salt Sea eastward.

**34:4** And your border shall turn from the south to the ascent of Akrabbim and pass on to Zin, and its goings out shall be from the south to Kadesh-barnea, and it shall go out to Hazar-addar and pass on to Azmon.

**34:5** And the border shall turn from Azmon to the Wadi of Egypt, and its goings out shall be toward the Sea.

**34:6** And as for the western border, the Great Sea shall be your border; this shall be your western border.

**34:7** And this shall be your northern border: from the Great Sea you shall mark out for yourselves Mount Hor.

**34:8** From Mount Hor you shall mark out to the entrance of Hamath, and the goings out of the border shall be toward Zedad.

**34:9** And the border shall go out to Ziphron, and its goings out shall be at Hazar-enan. This shall be your northern border.

**34:10** And you shall mark out for yourselves the eastern border from Hazar-enan to Shepham.

**34:11** And the border shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain. And the border shall go down and shall strike against the shoulder of the Sea of Kinnereth eastward.

**34:12** And the border shall go down to the Jordan, and its goings out shall be at the Salt Sea. This shall be your land according to its borders all around."

**34:13** And Moses commanded the sons of Israel, saying, "This is the land which you shall inherit by lot, which YHWH has commanded to give to the nine tribes and the half-tribe.

**34:14** For the tribe of the sons of Reuben according to the house of their fathers, and the tribe of the sons of Gad according to the house of their fathers, have received their inheritance; and the half-tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance.

**34:15** The two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan, opposite Jericho, eastward, toward the sunrise."

**34:16** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying,

**34:17** "These are the names of the men who shall divide the land for you as an inheritance: Eleazar the priest and Joshua son of Nun.

**34:18** And one leader, one leader from each tribe you shall take to divide the land as an inheritance.

**34:19** And these are the names of the men: for the tribe of Judah, Caleb son of Jephunneh.

**34:20** And for the tribe of the sons of Simeon, Shemuel son of Ammihud.

**34:21** For the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad son of Chislon.

**34:22** And for the tribe of the sons of Dan, a leader: Bukki son of Jogli.

**34:23** For the sons of Joseph: for the tribe of the sons of Manasseh, a leader: Hanniel son of Ephod.

**34:24** And for the tribe of the sons of Ephraim, a leader: Kemuel son of Shiphtan.

**34:25** And for the tribe of the sons of Zebulun, a leader: Elizaphan son of Parnach.

**34:26** And for the tribe of the sons of Issachar, a leader: Paltiel son of Azzan.

**34:27** And for the tribe of the sons of Asher, a leader: Ahihud son of Shelomi.

**34:28** And for the tribe of the sons of Naphtali, a leader: Pedahel son of Ammihud.

**34:29** These are the ones whom YHWH commanded to divide the inheritance for the sons of Israel in the land of Canaan."
